groups.title: LAST WORDS OF CANDY BRANDS IN THE SINGULAR
groups.explanation: LAST WORDS OF CANDY BRANDS IN THE SINGULAR

hints: Adjectives for attitude with a bold wink—playful, impudent, or a little too clever for the room.
Fitting-room shorthand: the numbers and lines a tailor records while shaping a garment to a body.
A community-card poker rhythm: one label is what you hide in your hand; the others mark each time more shared cards appear.
Candy-aisle wordplay: treat each entry as the lone tail end of a familiar multi-word treat name spoken in full.
